div.head: The Consul General at Shanghai (Cunningham) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Referring to Department’s September 28, 5 p.m. American shipping companies and warehousemen have agreed to release cargo in accordance with paragraph 7 of my September 26, 4 p.m.

list.item: There is no reciprocal understanding with foreign consulates and, inasmuch as American warehousemen have agreed to release, the questions raised in the Department’s September 28, 5 p.m., in paragraphs 2 and 3 do not arise. The importance of my being authorized to accept these duties is covered in my telegram of September 26, 4 p.m.

Longfellow and Adams have appealed from the Commissioner’s decision but will not pursue such appeal if Department authorizes me to accept duties in accordance with paragraph 7 of my September 26, 4 p.m. Repeated to Legation.
